description_long: This object is a rectangular sign with a white background and bold red capital letters spelling 'EXIT' across the front face. The sign is solid and block-like, with a flat, smooth surface and sharp, clean edges. The sides and back of the sign are plain and unmarked, maintaining the same white color as the background of the front. The sign appears to be made from a rigid material, likely plastic or metal, and is designed to be highly visible in indoor environments. Its proportions suggest it is intended to be mounted on a wall above a doorway or exit point. The overall appearance is utilitarian, prioritizing clear visibility and legibility.
description: A rectangular white sign with bold red 'EXIT' text on the front, designed for clear visibility and wall mounting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bold red 'EXIT' text on a white background.
description_view_1: Side view showing the plain, solid white edge with no visible markings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a featureless, flat white surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain white edge.
